SHORT NAME: FPL_PCT 

LONG NAME: FPL_PCT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–400 (whole numbers) or null/missing (income not required by the eligibility group for which they 
were determined eligible) 

COMMENT: This field is new, starting with the 2023 TAF DE RIF. It is not populated in data for earlier service years.
